title: Smartschool_Edit
description: One of my bigger projects, a Tampermonkey script that adds a lot of features to the Smartschool platform.

title: Andreasthuis' Minesweeper
description: My current project, a 3D Minesweeper game built in roblox. The game is still in early development, but it already has unique features and a unique art style.

title: Discord Block Bypass [DISCONTINUED]
description: A discord bot controlled by a website that allows you to bypass the block of the website in schools. The bot can be used to send messages to users in a specific server. This project is discontinued because it violates school rules and can get you in trouble.
